name: SpiralBeam
summary: A class for the spiral beam part.

constructors.name: SpiralBeam
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the SpiralBeam class.

constructors.name: SpiralBeam
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the SpiralBeam class with the given parameters. Rotation axis direction is current positive Z direction.

constructors.name: SpiralBeam
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the SpiralBeam class with the given parameters.

constructors.name: SpiralBeam
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the SpiralBeam class with the given parameters.

methods.name: CompareTo(Object)
methods.summary: Compares Identifiers of model objects.

methods.name: CompareTo(Part)
methods.summary: Compares the instantiated part with another one.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes the spiral beam with this instance identifier from the model database.

methods.name: Equals
methods.summary: Check if Identifiers of model objects are same.

methods.name: GetAllReportProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all properties for the model object in one hashtable. Type for the returned value must be checked using type casting.

methods.name: GetAllUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all properties for the model object in one hashtable. Type for the returned value must be checked using type casting.

methods.name: GetAssembly
methods.summary: Returns the assembly that the part belongs to.

methods.name: GetBolts
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the connected bolts.

methods.name: GetBooleans
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the connected boolean objects.

methods.name: GetCenterLine
methods.summary: Returns the center line for the given part.

methods.name: GetChildren
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the children model objects.

methods.name: GetComponents
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the connected components, connections, seams and details inherited from the base component.

methods.name: GetCoordinateSystem
methods.summary: Returns the coordinate system for the given model object.

methods.name: GetCustomObjectType
methods.summary: Gets custom object type name from an existing object.

methods.name: GetDoubleReportProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves multiple double report properties for the model object. It is faster to fetch multiple properties at once.

methods.name: GetDoubleUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all double properties for the model object.

methods.name: GetDSTVCoordinateSystem
methods.summary: Get DSTV coordinate system.

methods.name: GetDynamicStringProperty
methods.summary: Gets a dynamic string property from the model object.

methods.name: GetFatherComponent
methods.summary: Returns the father component of the model object.

methods.name: GetHierarchicObjects
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the connected hierarchic objects.

methods.name: GetIntegerReportProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves multiple integer report properties for the model object. It is faster to fetch multiple properties at once.

methods.name: GetIntegerUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all integer properties for the model object.

methods.name: GetPartMark
methods.summary: Returns the part mark.

methods.name: GetPhase
methods.summary: Retrieves the phase of the model object (the phase number, the phase name, the phase comment and whether the phase is the current one or not).

methods.name: GetPours
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the pours that the part belongs to.

methods.name: GetReferenceLine
methods.summary: Returns the reference line for the given part.

methods.name: GetReinforcements
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the connected reinforcements.

methods.name: GetReportProperty(String, Double.)
methods.summary: Retrieves a double property of the report for the model object.

methods.name: GetReportProperty(String, Int32.)
methods.summary: Retrieves an integer property of the report for the model object.

methods.name: GetReportProperty(String, String.)
methods.summary: Retrieves a string property of the report for the model object.

methods.name: GetSolid.
methods.summary: Returns the solid of the part.

methods.name: GetSolid(FormingStates)
methods.summary: Returns the solid of the part.

methods.name: GetSolid(Solid.SolidCreationTypeEnum)
methods.summary: Returns the solid of the part.

methods.name: GetStringReportProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves multiple string report properties for the model object. It is faster to fetch multiple properties at once.

methods.name: GetStringUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all string properties for the model object.

methods.name: GetSurfaceObjects
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the connected surface objects.

methods.name: GetSurfaceTreatments
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the connected surface treatments.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Double.)
methods.summary: Retrieves a double property for the model object.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Int32.)
methods.summary: Retrieves an integer property for the model object.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, String.)
methods.summary: Retrieves a string property for the model object.

methods.name: GetWelds
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the connected welds.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Inserts the spiral beam into the model database. All the attributes must be set.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies the spiral beam object values in the database.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects a spiral beam object from the database.

methods.name: SetCustomObjectType
methods.summary: Sets a custom object type name for an existing object.

methods.name: SetDynamicStringProperty
methods.summary: Sets a dynamic string property for the model object.

methods.name: SetLabel
methods.summary: Sets a label for an object when a new instance is created, this method must be called before Insert. The label is used in plug-ins for identifying the changed object in modification.

methods.name: SetPhase
methods.summary: Sets the phase of the model object.

methods.name: SetUserProperties
methods.summary: Sets multiple properties for the model object.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Double)
methods.summary: Sets a double property for the model object.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Int32)
methods.summary: Sets an integer property for the model object.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, String)
methods.summary: Sets a string property for the model object.

properties.name: AssemblyNumber
properties.summary: Gets or sets the assembly number. Defines the numbering in the assembly sense.

properties.name: CastUnitType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the cast unit type of the part.

properties.name: Class
properties.summary: Gets or sets the class of the part.

properties.name: DeformingData
properties.summary: Gets or sets the deforming data of the part.

properties.name: EndPoint
properties.summary: Gets the spiral beam end point.

properties.name: Finish
properties.summary: Gets or sets the finish of the part.

properties.name: Identifier
properties.summary: The identifier of the object.

properties.name: IsUpToDate
properties.summary: Gets if the object does not have a modification which is not shared.

properties.name: Material
properties.summary: Gets or sets the material the part is made of.

properties.name: ModificationTime
properties.summary: Gets latest time of the object was modified or created.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of the part.

properties.name: PartNumber
properties.summary: Gets or sets the part number. Defines the numbering in the part sense.

properties.name: Position
properties.summary: Gets or sets the part position. Defines the way the part is positioned in the model.

properties.name: PourPhase
properties.summary: Gets or sets the pour phase of the part.

properties.name: Profile
properties.summary: Gets or sets the profile of the part.

properties.name: RotationAngle
properties.summary: Gets or sets the rotation of the spiral beam in degrees. Each range of 360.0 degrees adds a full rotation.

properties.name: RotationAxisBasePoint
properties.summary: Gets or sets the first definition point of the spiral beam rotation axis.

properties.name: RotationAxisDirection
properties.summary: Gets the direction of the spiral beam rotation axis.

properties.name: RotationAxisUpPoint
properties.summary: Gets or sets the second definition point of the spiral beam rotation axis.

properties.name: RotationCenterPoint
properties.summary: Gets the geometric rotation center point at the start of the spiral beam.

properties.name: StartPoint
properties.summary: Gets or sets the start point of the spiral beam.

properties.name: TotalRise
properties.summary: Gets or sets the difference between the spiral beam start and end point in the direction of the rotation axis.

properties.name: TwistAngleEnd
properties.summary: Gets or sets the twist angle in degrees at the end of the spiral beam.

properties.name: TwistAngleStart
properties.summary: Gets or sets the twist angle in degrees at the start of the spiral beam.
